user.title: Add a monitored device
user.description: Give this a name and pick what it is. A WireGuard tunnel isn't monitored itself, but can then be selected as the "interface" for a ping or port device.

ping.title: Ping settings
ping.description: Picking a WireGuard tunnel here checks TCP reachability through it instead of a real ICMP ping (WireGuard-in-Python has no ICMP support), so a port is required in that case.

data.interface: Network interface (pick a configured WireGuard tunnel, or type your own for the system ping)
data.port: TCP port (required if a WireGuard tunnel is selected above)

wireguard.title: WireGuard tunnel
wireguard.description: Runs entirely in Python (via wireguard-requests) - no system network interface, no wireguard-tools, no NET_ADMIN. Only TCP is supported, no ICMP. Either point at an existing wg-quick config file, or fill in the keys/peer below to build one.

data.config_path: Existing wg-quick config file path (relative paths resolve against the Home Assistant config directory)

notify.title: Notifications & schedule
notify.description: Choose which notify services (e.g. your phone's companion app) should be alerted, and how often this device is checked.

data.notify_offline: Notify when this device goes offline
data.notify_online: Also notify when it comes back online

error.invalid_cron: That's not a valid cron expression.
error.wireguard_needs_inline_fields: Fill in a config file path, or private key + address + peer public key + peer endpoint + peer allowed IPs.
error.wireguard_ping_needs_port: A WireGuard tunnel only supports TCP checks - set a port to check.

abort.already_configured: A device with this name is already configured.

init.title: Notifications & schedule
init.description: Change which notify services are used and how often this device is checked.

data.notify_offline: Notify when this device goes offline
data.notify_online: Also notify when it comes back online

wireguard.title: WireGuard tunnel
wireguard.description: Editing this reconnects the tunnel with the new details.

data.config_path: Existing wg-quick config file path (relative paths resolve against the Home Assistant config directory)

error.invalid_cron: That's not a valid cron expression.
error.wireguard_needs_inline_fields: Fill in a config file path, or private key + address + peer public key + peer endpoint + peer allowed IPs.
error.wireguard_ping_needs_port: A WireGuard tunnel only supports TCP checks - set a port to check.
